hero.title: Websites that work for you.
hero.subtitle: Most websites stop at looking presentable. Yours can book appointments, keep itself current, and bring in new enquiries while you are busy with everything else.

reb.progressLabel: Progress – click or drag to jump
reb.reducedMotionIntro: REB no longer has to rely only on expensive property portals. Their own website now shows live listings straight from the real-estate software.

chapters.label: Before
chapters.title: An outdated website
chapters.body: An outdated WordPress theme with plenty of text, a handful of photos, and no actual listings for visitors to explore.

chapters.label: After
chapters.title: Live listings, directly on the website
chapters.body: REB’s properties now flow straight from the real-estate software, keeping the site current without extra admin.

chapters.label: Result
chapters.title: Independent and always current
chapters.body: People can enquire directly on the company’s own site, without a portal in between, on any device.

booking.title: Online booking for service businesses
booking.meta: Online appointments · Admin panel · Concept demo
booking.body: Fewer missed calls and less messaging back and forth. The site captures preferred times, contact details, and context so the next step is obvious.
booking.requestBody: Preferred time, contact details, and notes are already in one place.
booking.question: Question

steps.label: Book
steps.title: Interest turns into a booking
steps.body: Visitors see open times and pick a slot while they are still ready to act.

steps.label: Request
steps.title: The key details arrive together
steps.body: Name, contact details, service, and preferred time arrive together. No guessing and no chasing missing information.

steps.label: Manage
steps.title: The team stays in control
steps.body: New requests are organised in the admin area and can be confirmed or answered right away.

heading.title: Useful features, not decoration.
heading.sub: A few examples of what a website can do when it is built to support your daily work, not just introduce your business.

software.note: I’ll be honest about what is worth building.

outcomes.title: Book appointments online
outcomes.body: Customers choose an available time themselves, whenever it suits them, without calling first.

outcomes.title: Content that stays up to date
outcomes.body: Offers, prices, or availability can update automatically from one source, so you do not have to maintain the same thing twice.

outcomes.title: Show Google reviews
outcomes.body: Your best Google reviews can appear on the site automatically, helping people trust you before they get in touch.

outcomes.title: Answer questions automatically
outcomes.body: An AI assistant can handle common questions at any time and pass serious enquiries on to you.

gfx.aiAnswer: The first one is free. Should I suggest a time?

heading.title: From rough idea to live website.
heading.sub: A simple process: we clarify the goal, shape the page, and launch it without turning the project into homework for you.

steps.title: A first conversation
steps.body: You tell me what you want to achieve, by phone or in person.

steps.title: A clickable draft
steps.body: You can see, click through, and comment on the site before anything is final.

steps.title: Your website goes live
steps.body: The finished site is online, mobile-friendly, and ready for new enquiries.

pricing.title: A price that fits the job.
pricing.sub: First we clarify what the website actually needs to do. Then you get a fixed price.
pricing.rangeNote: Typical when the website needs to do more than simply exist online.

angebot.recurringRest: — then €50/mo: hosting, domain, updates & small changes.

ueber.title: Hi, I’m Néstor.
body: My day job is software development, and I bring the same standard to websites: they should be fast, reliable, and easy to understand.
You do not need to figure out the technical side. I turn your idea into a website that looks good, works properly, and helps people get in touch.

kontakt.title: Let’s talk.
kontakt.intro: You do not need a finished brief. A rough idea is enough. In the free first call, I’ll tell you honestly what makes sense.
kontakt.sentBody: Thank you. I have your message and will reply personally within the next day or two.
kontakt.formTitle: Tell me briefly what you have in mind.
kontakt.name: Name
kontakt.errorBeforeEmail: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly at
kontakt.privacy: Your message comes straight to me. No automated funnel, no sales team.

impressum.title: Legal notice
paragraphs:
Information according to § 5 TMG
Néstor Iriondo
Web development & digital consulting
Please add the full address for service and all final mandatory details before publication.

datenschutz.title: Privacy
paragraphs: This website processes personal data when you contact me via the contact form, email, phone, or WhatsApp.
The information is used only to answer your enquiry and prepare a possible collaboration. It is only shared when technically required or legally necessary.
The final privacy policy should be checked against the services actually used, such as hosting, form delivery, analytics, or embedded content.

mini.oldBody: We offer comprehensive consulting for business development. Click here for more...
mini.sub: Independent consulting for medium-sized businesses, personal and at eye level.

reb.messageText: Interested in this apartment. Please call me back.
